// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace <global namespace>
{
    partial class GlobalStatus
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, GlobalStatus> _byId = new Dictionary<int, GlobalStatus>()
        {
            [1] = Active,
            [2] = Inactive,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, GlobalStatus> _byName = new Dictionary<string, GlobalStatus>()
        {
            ["Active"] = Active,
            ["Inactive"] = Inactive,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of GlobalStatus ordered by ID.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<GlobalStatus> GetAll() => _byId.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the GlobalStatus instance from its ID value.
        /// </summary>
        public static GlobalStatus FromValue(int id)
        {
            if (_byId.TryGetValue(id, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No GlobalStatus with Id {id} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the GlobalStatus instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static GlobalStatus FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No GlobalStatus with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the GlobalStatus instance from its ID value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int id, out GlobalStatus? result)
        {
            return _byId.TryGetValue(id, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the GlobalStatus instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, out GlobalStatus? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }

    }

#if NET6_0_OR_GREATER
    public class GlobalStatusJsonConverter : System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonConverter<GlobalStatus>
    {
        public override GlobalStatus? Read(ref System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, Type typeToConvert, System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
        {
            if (reader.TokenType == System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType.Number && reader.TryGetInt32(out var id))
            {
                return GlobalStatus.TryFromValue(id, out var result) ? result : null;
            }
            if (reader.TokenType == System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType.String)
            {
                var name = reader.GetString();
                return name != null && GlobalStatus.TryFromName(name, out var result) ? result : null;
            }
            return null;
        }

        public override void Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, GlobalStatus value, System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
        {
            writer.WriteNumberValue(value.Id);
        }
    }
#endif
}
